title: diversified_address_orchard_uses_found_di_not_start oracle design is correct
description: The oracle test finds a start where Sapling skips (found_di > start), derives the UA via diversified_address, decodes its Orchard receiver, and compares to address_at_index(found_di_index) — an independent call through the Orchard key schedule. A future contributor might suggest 'this test is redundant because the 1000-chained-distinct test already proves correctness'. Resist: the chained test only proves distinctness, not that Orchard used the correct DI. A bug where Orchard always uses DI=0 would pass the distinctness test (Sapling bytes differ) but fail this oracle test.
